title: peyritschia angusta
intro: Peyritschia angusta, also known as small-fruited peyritschia or lesser peyritschia, is a flowering plant in the carrot family that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Peyritschia angusta include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful for treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Peyritschia angusta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Peyritschia angusta are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used internally to treat a range of health issues or externally to apply to skin irritations.
